LanguageData.PMP.EnergyFieldDeployFailed: Could not deploy energy field at this location.
LanguageData.PMP.Settings.NoSectionContent: Select a section on the left.
LanguageData.PMP.AirPatrolSettings.Title: Extra hostile targets (ThingDefs: {0}). Checked defs are merged with XML AirPatrolExtraTargetsDef.
LanguageData.PMP.AirPatrolSettings.SearchHint: Search by defName, translated label, or English label from XML.
LanguageData.PMP.SupportLetter.Prism.Label: Prism Alpha: Low-Orbit Suppression
LanguageData.PMP.SupportLetter.Prism.Description: Acknowledged. This is Prism Alpha. Friendly ship inbound. All batteries ready. Low-orbit suppression active.
LanguageData.PMP.SupportLetter.Carrier.Label: Aurora: Attack Drone Legion
LanguageData.PMP.SupportLetter.Carrier.Description: Acknowledged. Graviton slingshot charged. Launching attack drone cluster. Legion bombardment active. Mind friendly fire. Out.
LanguageData.PMP.SupportLetter.Vanguard.Label: Vanguard Zeta: Orbital Bombardment
LanguageData.PMP.SupportLetter.Vanguard.Description: Vanguard Zeta on station in low orbit. Target locked to your requested coordinates. Carpet bombing underway.
LanguageData.PMP.SupportLetter.GreatWyrm.Label: Great Wyrm: Air-to-Air Sweep
LanguageData.PMP.SupportLetter.GreatWyrm.Description: Acknowledged. Fighter wing warped in. Great Wyrm airspace sweep underway.
LanguageData.PMP.SupportLetter.EnergyField.Label: Aurora: Projected Energy Field
LanguageData.PMP.SupportLetter.EnergyField.Descriptio: Acknowledged. Beginning energy field projection at your designated location.
LanguageData.PMP.SupernovaDeployFailed: Could not deploy supernova at this location.
LanguageData.PMP.SupportLetter.Supernova.Label: Aurora: Supernova
LanguageData.PMP.SupportLetter.Supernova.Description: Acknowledged. Warping supernova to target coordinates.
